create table #tmp_sp_help_category  			(category_id int null, category_type tinyint null, name nvarchar(128) null)  			insert into #tmp_sp_help_category exec msdb.dbo.sp_help_category  		   SELECT sv.name AS [Name], CAST(sv.enabled AS bit) AS [IsEnabled], tshc.name AS [Category], sv.category_id

CREATE   PROCEDURE sp_help_jobschedule    @job_id              UNIQUEIDENTIFIER = NULL,    @job_name            sysname          = NULL,    @schedule_name       sysname          = NULL,    @schedule_id         INT              = NULL,    @include_description BIT              = 0 -- 1 if a schedu
